reviews.review_description:
This app is great  I hope it’s gonna grow .

I will buy it 👍

reviews.review_title: Refreshing entry to the VR Workout scene
reviews.review_description:
Severe workout scene is now being oversaturated with the same things over and over. This is a breath of fresh air I can’t wait to see the progress. 

Dear Developers, are you looking for someone to help beta test? If so, please reach out to me. I want to help make this the best big thing!

developer_response.body:
Hey, thank you for the kind words! We are at the moment looking for funds, but as soon as we will have a new version to publish, sure, we would love you to help! Send us an email at 
info AT ntwalkers DOT it
and let's keep in touch!

reviews.review_description: Beat Saber is on VR now!?

reviews.review_title: Great exercise boxing VR , more please
reviews.review_description:
First, thank you developers for this great VR boxing, I enjoy it very much.
The workouts, the environment, the level design are all great.  Please continue to add more training,  more fun workout if possible.   I do recommend this game to everyone.

(Dec 22) the pass-through AR mode is super great for this type of exercises because my small play area, I can see my area in AR pass through mode , great safety 😀 👍 😄 👏. 

Please continue to add more if possible.

developer_response.body: Thanks Bryan, we are very happy you like our AR mode! I hope you will enjoy even more the full game when it will come out!

reviews.review_description: But this game is also great.

I'm not a big boxer but the learning steps are super easy to get! The game is easy to understand, the level design is great adding more complexity to each level but not loosing the user. I recommand anyone to start his punching training there!

reviews.review_title: I absolutely LOVE THIS GAME. Hidden Gem!
reviews.review_description: This has to be one of the best games I have ever played on any oculus device. The ability to track velocity and direction is so impressive. The training is very easy to follow. The experience is really immersive. I can’t wait for the next chapter!

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot, man! We are happy you enjoyed the game!

reviews.review_description: Super:))) very good job

reviews.review_title: Great direction for solid workout title
reviews.review_description:
What I like:
1) Haptics feel great
2) Sound effects are not bad
3) Penalizes you for bad form
4) Fairly good workout
5) Custom songs (was thinking the music would get annoying, glad I can use my own music)
6) I like the gamification

What I think could be improved
1) I wish I could somehow turn up the pace, a little too limited for me.  Maybe sometimes make double or triple hits before the orbs disappear, for example?
2) The beams could come a little faster as well, make the combos and ducking feel a little more life-like.
Decently nice workout for teenagers that are locked to the home not the gym, Simple concept, Got boring after a bit but I'll still play it just for the exercise
If they keep going with this game it could be one of the best "boxing trainers" in VR. Definitely needs some tweaks but it's very solid.

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot! We have just updated it with some new levels, if you want to give it a try again!

In 2022, we want to work on a full version of this game

reviews.review_description: I actually like the game alot, but I like fighting real people even more. I'm alright with just using as addition to my boxing training but , will we be able to fight actual guys or no??

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback. We are more like training with targets... we are also thinking about a hybrid mode, but probably this will happen in the full version of the game.

reviews.review_description: Awesome app. Practice punch combinations,  you will get a good workout with it.

Working out in VR is my primary experience I run towards!
Not one for rhythm games, this game keeps it simple with tunes to keep you hyped!
Part of my routine now, works well to not over extend you're posture or form to hurt yourself!
Highly recommend if you like working up a sweat with boxing style experiences!

Good on you devs!
Really good app for fitness. Works good also in AR
This is such great fun to play, and you get a seriously sweaty workout!! Highly recommended for all ages - been using this with Autism groups and they love it. Well done to the developer :)
Love the game BUT, are there more levels?  Have I reach the end?

developer_response.body:
Thanks! We are glad you love it. Btw, we have just added 3 new levels! And then for each level there are time and force modifiers so you can keep using them by making them more difficult every time!

This is a free demo, we plan to work on the full paid game in 2022

reviews.review_description: This is a great trainer that forces great form and is an incredible workout!  I'm impressed

reviews.review_title: One of the best focus mitt boxing apps
reviews.review_description: If you enjoy focus mitt drills, this app is perfect for you.
